chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمَمَالِيكِ وَ الْمُكَاتَبِينَ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 45 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obigated upon the owned (slaves) and the contracted (slaves)

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الْمَمْلُوكِ يَفْتَرِي عَلَى الْحُرِّ قَالَ يُجْلَدُ ثَمَانِينَ قُلْتُ فَإِنَّهُ زَنَى قَالَ يُجْلَدُ خَمْسِينَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the slave who fabricates upon the free. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He would be whipped eighty (lashes)’. I said, ‘So if it was adultery?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘he would be whipped fifty (lashes)’.
